name: Session State and Event Bus
description: The state/ module manages live session lifecycle, routes agent events through an in-process EventBus, and bridges amplifier-core events to the SSE transport — making it the core runtime hub of the daemon.

name: HTTP Routes and SSE Streaming
description: The routes/ module defines all REST endpoints (sessions, agents, approvals, bundles, events) and the SSE streaming transport that clients consume for real-time agent output.

name: Security and Auth Middleware
description: The security/ module implements TLS configuration, CORS origin validation, authentication middleware (API keys and proxy trust), and Tailscale integration — cross-cutting every HTTP request.

name: App Startup and Configuration
description: The cli.py, app.py, and config.py files form the daemon's startup path — resolving settings from CLI flags, environment variables, and JSON files, then assembling and wiring the FastAPI application with all routes, middleware, and plugins.
